_comment: Curate the Selected Works chapter. pinned forces order (lowercase owner/repo). displayNames overrides the GitHub repo name with a friendlier label. descriptions overrides the GitHub About text. exclude suppresses a specific repo even if GitHub returns it.

descriptions.ipelengmekgwe/carsties: An online car-auction platform built with .NET 8 microservices, RabbitMQ + MassTransit, gRPC, SignalR, and a Next.js client.
descriptions.ipelengmekgwe/skinet: A full-stack e-commerce store — .NET 8 API, Angular 18 client, Stripe checkout, ASP.NET Identity, and a Redis-backed basket.
descriptions.ipelengmekgwe/github-branch-manager: A small .NET console utility for keeping a GitHub repo's branch list tidy — list, audit, and bulk-prune branches without clicking through the GitHub UI.
descriptions.ipelengmekgwe/hiddenvilla: A villa booking and reservations platform with Stripe checkout, role-based admin, and PDF confirmations — .NET 6 MVC + Razor.
descriptions.ipelengmekgwe/azureservicebusdemo: Hands-on .NET 8 samples for Azure Service Bus — queues, topics with filtered subscriptions, sessions, dead-letter handling, and scheduled messages.
descriptions.ipelengmekgwe/meditation-expo-react-nati: A guided meditation timer for iOS & Android — Expo SDK 51, React Native, TypeScript, NativeWind, Expo Router, and expo-av.
